case_title: TORI FREEMAN VS. BRADLEY L. WINCH JR.

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$0.00 <WAIVED>) SERVED MAR-30-2015, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT WINCH JR., BRADLEY L.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAY-20-2015 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAY-20-2015 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. NO COST, IFP FILED BY PLAINTIFF. PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-20-2015 - JUDGMENT.
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT

SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL CALENDAR OF JUL-23-2015 - SMALL CLAIMS JUDGMENT AFFIRMED. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT). JUDGE PRO TEM JEFFREY D. WOHLS, CLERK J. KONG, NOT REPORTED, D525. THIS JUDGMENT ON APPEAL IS FINAL. EXHIBITS WILL BE DESTROYED PURSUANT TO CCP 1952.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF FREEMAN, TORI RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WINCH JR., BRADLEY L. $4,153.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,153.00, IN LIEU OF PAYMENT AND AT THE ELECTION OF DEFENDANT, DEFENDANT MAY, NOT LATER THAN JUNE 30, 2015 CONVEY TITLE & RETURN THE 2002 JEEP LIBERTY, LICENSE # 4TYS921, TO PLAINTIFF. calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Jul-23-2015 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: Appearances on Thursday, July 23, 2015 in Department 525:
Tori Freeman, Respondent/Plaintiff appears as Propria Persona.
Bradley L. Winch Jr., Appellant/Defendant appears as Propria Persona.

This cause comes on regularly for trial de novo. All parties are sworn. Plaintiff/Respondent, Tori Freeman testifies on her own behalf and responds to the questions from the Court.

Defendant/Appellant, Bradley L. Winch Jr. testifies on his own behalf and responds to the questions from the Court.

At the conclusion of the hearing, the Court takes this matter under submission. No evidence were presented in the Court. Plaintiff/Respondent's exhibits from Small Claims Court is retained.

Judge Pro Tem Jeffrey Wohl; Clerk J. Kong; matter not reported.

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar May-21-2015 Judgment Entered
